resistance_timeline_notes: No South Africa-specific MRBP isolate data published. CDC (2025) notes global MRBP spread primarily from China; PAHO (2025) reports cases in Americas. Systematic review (Antibiotics 2022;11:1570) confirms sporadic cases outside China. No African MRBP reports in accessible literature. Conservative low anchor retained with slightly elevated point estimate reflecting global importation risk.
mechanism_interpretation: Full baseline mechanism: country anchor, resistant importation, strain-specific treatment and PEP, neutral fitness.
